content.content:
I found a calendar event that looks like your dental check-up:

- Title: Dentist Appointment  
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00  
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic  
- Event ID: 5

Before I reschedule it I need a bit more info — I can’t pick a new time without your input. Please tell me one of the following:

- A specific new date and start time (e.g., “May 21 at 10:00”), or  
- A range or preference (e.g., “any morning next week,” “weekday afternoons only,” or “sometime the week of May 27”), or  
- If you want me to propose 2–3 options for you to choose from.

Also confirm:
- Do you want me to notify the dental office directly? (The event currently only lists your email. If yes, please provide the clinic’s email or phone, or tell me to add a participant and I’ll add the clinic contact you give.)
- OK to go ahead and reschedule once I have the new time?

Tell me your preferred option and I’ll reschedule it.
